news.summary: The Israeli military has ordered Lebanese residents to leave some 17% of the country's territory.

news.headline: YouTuber Defamed Movie Star Using A.I., South Korean Police Say
news.summary: They arrested the man, accusing him of fabricating a voice recording to implicate Kim Soo-hyun in dating a minor.
